name: card-with-form
visual_summary: The card-with-form component is a rectangular container that displays a form within a card layout. It is typically used on a web page to collect user information or to present a questionnaire. Developers would use this component when they need to incorporate a form within a visual context.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready card component with the following characteristics:

Name: card-with-form
Description: The card-with-form component is a rectangular container that displays a form within a card layout. It is typically used on a web page to collect user information or to present a questionnaire. Developers would use this component when they need to incorporate a form within a visual context.
Style: e.g. material, neumorphic, flat
Interactions: e.g. hover, clickable
Tags: form, card, input, data-collection

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
